title: Gratin Lentil Stew
description: A hearty, comforting Italian-inspired stew made with roasted lentils and topped with a crispy gratin crust.
instructions: In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, carrot, and lentils to the pot. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 4 cups water to the pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Stir in Parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the stew to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional Parmesan cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
